bead.title: artifacts: wire server-side search in frontend, debounce + stale-response drop
bead.description: Frontend artifacts search currently runs over loaded edges only — incorrect past page 1. Wire to server-side artifacts(search:) with debounce + stale-response drop.
bead.acceptance: 1. Frontend search calls server. 2. Debounced (200ms typical). 3. Stale responses dropped on race. 4. Tests cover correctness past page 1.
